prompt.title: Compare and recommend
prompt.text: Compare these [proposals/vendors/options] across cost, risk, time-to-value, and effort in a table. Recommend one and explain the trade-offs in two sentences.

tip.tip: Turn a Word doc into a deck: 'create a presentation from this document'. Then refine with 'add a slide summarizing the budget' or 'make this slide more visual'. Use 'summarize this presentation' to brief yourself fast.

editions.copyText:
MICROSOFT 365 COPILOT — CHAMPION WEEKLY (June 11, 2026)

PROMPT OF THE WEEK — Compare and recommend
"Compare these [proposals/vendors/options] across cost, risk, time-to-value, and effort in a table. Recommend one and explain the trade-offs in two sentences."

COPILOT IN POWERPOINT
Turn a Word doc into a deck: 'create a presentation from this document'. Then refine with 'add a slide summarizing the budget' or 'make this slide more visual'. Use 'summarize this presentation' to brief yourself fast.

FRONTIER SPOTLIGHT — Microsoft Scout
An AI desktop app that stays connected to your priorities, monitors what matters, and moves work forward across the Microsoft 365 apps you use every day.
Learn more: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/frontier-features

ON THE ROADMAP — Planner Agent in Microsoft 365 Copilot (In development)
Planner agent in Microsoft 365 will help you plan, organize, and manage work more efficiently. We’re starting with core task and plan management features to simplify project tracking and will introduce additional advanced project management capabilities over time. Updated May 21, 2026: We previously launched in Preview and GA is expected in June. We apologize for any inconvenience.
Details: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/roadmap?id=516576

WORTH A READ
- How to Connect Copilot Studio to Teams, Outlook, and OneDrive: A Complete Guide — https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/microsoft-365-copilot/how-to-connect-copilot-studio-to-teams-outlook-and-onedrive-a/m-p/4527896#M6564
- Best Copilot Studio Agents for HR Teams: Transforming the Future of Human Resources — https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/microsoft-365-copilot/best-copilot-studio-agents-for-hr-teams-transforming-the-future/m-p/4527895#M6563

Questions? Reach your Copilot Champion. Built for guidance only; references public Microsoft sources.
